item.description: A sailor gives his account how he completed the first solo sailing voyage around the world.

item.title: The Fifth Queen Crowned, by Ford Madox Ford
item.description: Katharine Howard, Queen of England, reaches the height of her power, only to find that idealism and integrity are fragile weapons against court intrigue and religious faction.
